title: Pareto Chart for Query Distribution
description: An interactive Chart.js Pareto chart showing how a small number of chatbot intent types accounts for the majority of query traffic, with an 80% threshold and focus zone.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.topic: Query distribution and the Pareto principle
learningObjectives: Interpret a Pareto chart of chatbot intent frequencies
Identify the critical few intents that dominate traffic and prioritize them
educational.prerequisites: Familiarity with bar and line charts and percentages

pedagogical.instructionalStrategy: Interactive combined bar-and-line chart with hover tooltips and an 80% focus zone
pedagogical.assessment: Students decide which intents to optimize first given the distribution
